start_sequence_contract.default_rule: Run the complaint-defined start sequence, then follow question_schedule.default_profile in listed order unless an explicit alternate profile is selected.

primary_mode.rationale: Oedema has a wide differential (cardiac, renal, hepatic, DVT, anaphylaxis, medication). Increased budget to ensure danger follow-ups and modules are completed. Caps increased in v1.1.0 to preserve room for complaint flow while session hard cap supports ROS and module questions.

secondary_mode.selection_rule: If this complaint is secondary, ask only the listed priority questions unless a red-flag branch activates or unresolved shared danger concepts remain.

reallocation_rules: If urgent red flags are active, borrow from extended_characterize and high_priority_followup before borrowing from context history.
If the complaint is secondary and no danger trigger is active, remain within secondary_question_budget.

presenting_complaint_narrative.text: Please provide information about presenting complaint narrative.

calf_pain.text: Is there pain or tenderness in the calf?

calf_pain_details.text: Where is the calf pain or tenderness, and is it worse when walking or touching the area?

calf_redness.text: Is the calf or swollen area red?

calf_redness_details.text: Where is the redness or warmth, and has it spread?

shortness_of_breath.text: Have you had any difficulty in breathing?

shortness_of_breath_details.text: Is it at rest, on exertion, or lying flat? How severe?

orthopnea.text: Is your breathing worse when you lie flat?

orthopnea_details.text: How many pillows do you need, or do you need to sit upright to breathe comfortably?

paroxysmal_nocturnal_dyspnea.ui_label: Waking short of breath at night
paroxysmal_nocturnal_dyspnea.text: Do you wake from sleep short of breath or gasping for air?

paroxysmal_nocturnal_dyspnea_details.text: How often do you wake from sleep short of breath or gasping for air?

facial_swelling.text: Have you had facial or lip swelling?

facial_swelling_details.text: Which part of the face or lips is swollen, and did it come on suddenly?

tongue_swelling_details.text: Is the tongue swelling affecting speech, swallowing, or breathing?

chest_pain.text: Do you have any chest pain or tightness?

chest_pain_details.text: Where exactly? What does it feel like?

recent_change_in_pattern.text: Has the pattern changed noticeably in the last few weeks?

recent_change_in_pattern_details.text: What has changed – severity, daily pattern, or any new symptoms?

pitting_character.text: If you press on the swollen area, does it leave an indent?

diurnal_variation.text: Is the swelling worse at the end of the day?

skin_changes_over_swelling.text: Any skin changes over the swollen area?

skin_changes_over_swelling_details.text: What changes have you noticed – colour, texture, or temperature?

low_urine_output.text: Are you passing much less urine than usual?

low_urine_output_details.text: Please give more details about low urine output.

fever_details.text: What was the highest temperature, when did it start, and is there redness, warmth, or tenderness over the swollen area?

local_inflammation_over_swelling.text: Is there redness, warmth, tenderness, or skin irritation over the swollen area?

local_inflammation_over_swelling_details.text: Which area is red, warm, tender, irritated, weeping, or changed?

abdominal_distension.text: Has your abdomen become swollen or more bloated than usual?

abdominal_distension_details.text: How long has it been swollen?

associated_symptoms.text: Have any other symptoms come with it?

associated_symptoms_details.text: What other symptoms have come with the fatigue?

known_heart_failure.text: Have you ever been told you have heart failure?

known_heart_failure_details.text: What is the diagnosis? What medications?

known_kidney_disease.text: Do you have any known kidney problems?

known_kidney_disease_details.text: What kidney condition do you have?

known_liver_disease.text: Do you have any liver problems?

known_liver_disease_details.text: What liver condition do you have?

recent_immobility.text: Have you been stuck in bed, on a long trip, or not moving around much recently?

recent_immobility_details.text: Please give more details about recent immobility.

recent_travel_details.text: Please give more details about recent travel.

recent_surgery.text: Have you had any recent surgery or procedure?

recent_surgery_details.text: Please give more details about recent surgery.

recent_trauma.text: Did this start after an injury, fall, blow, or accident?

recent_trauma_details.text: Please give more details about recent trauma.

pregnancy_context.text: Could you be pregnant now, or are you recently postpartum?

pregnancy_context_details.text: How far along? Or how many weeks postpartum?

jaundice.text: Have you noticed yellowing of your eyes or skin?

jaundice_details.ui_label: Yellowing of eyes or skin details
jaundice_details.text: When did the yellowing start, and have you noticed dark urine or pale stool?

foamy_urine.text: Is your urine foamy or frothy?

foamy_urine_details.text: How long has this been happening?

final_closeout_question.text: Is there anything else you want to mention that we have not asked about yet?

prior_clot_history.text: Have you ever had a blood clot, such as DVT or pulmonary embolism?

prior_clot_history_details.text: When did it happen, where was the clot, and what treatment did you receive?

swelling_location.text: Where is the swelling — feet, ankles, legs, hands, face, abdomen, or all over?

swelling_distribution.text: Is the swelling on one side, both sides, or generalized all over?

acute_unilateral_swelling.text: Did one leg or one area become swollen suddenly?

acute_unilateral_swelling_details.text: Which leg? How quickly did it come on?

rapid_weight_gain.text: Have you gained weight rapidly over the past few days or weeks?

rapid_weight_gain_details.text: How much weight? Over what period?

swelling_related_medications.text: Are you taking any medicines that can cause swelling, such as amlodipine, steroids, NSAIDs, gabapentin, or pioglitazone?

swelling_related_medications_details.text: Which medication and when did you start?

hypothyroid_symptoms.text: Have you had symptoms such as cold intolerance, constipation, dry skin, or unexplained weight gain?

hypothyroid_symptoms_details.text: Which symptoms? When did they start?

targeted_ros_plan.policy_note: Finish unresolved concepts in the pathological system before borrowing from cross-system ROS.

profile_switch_rules.trigger: No alternate complaint-specific profile is active

source_rebuild_note: Rebuilt from uploaded older v2(8) source while preserving v5 runtime standards: clean phases, unique codes, ROS-owned dedup families, retired live fields removed, and compound concepts split.
opening_state_note: Selecting this complaint should set state['oedema'] = 'yes' before questioning begins.
